creator: acc@anthonychavez.org
text:
It would appear that this issue is fixed by simply rebuilding
lang/perl5.8 with -DWITH_THREADS.

Doing so will additionally require reinstallation of, at minimum, the
p5-Storable, p5-Scalar-List-Utils, p5-Glib2, p5-Gtk2, and
p5-Gtk2{,-Ex-{FormFactory,Simple-List}} packages.

-- 
Anthony Chavez                                 http://anthonychavez.org/
mailto:acc@anthonychavez.org         jabber:acc@jabber.anthonychavez.org
